whatWasImplemented: Extended /auth/callback to accept both magic-link shapes: `?code=CODE` (PKCE / exchangeCodeForSession) and `?token_hash=HASH&type=magiclink|email|recovery|invite|signup` (email OTP / verifyOtp). The second shape is what Supabase admin-generated magic links (and most signInWithOtp emails) actually use — which is why VAL-AUTH-003 failed in foundation round 1.
Unknown OTP types and missing params all redirect to /login?error=auth_callback_error — covers VAL-AUTH-012 (replayed / already-consumed links).
External-origin `next` values continue to be stripped by sanitizeRedirectPath (VAL-AUTH-005).

Added src/__tests__/helpers/auth.ts with createTestSessionViaAdmin() — mints a valid access + refresh token pair for E2E without going through OTP (sidesteps the rate limit that blocked foundation). Backed by pg-direct auth.users insert + HS256 JWT signing.
Added auth-callback-route.test.ts (9 tests), auth-signout.test.ts (2 tests), auth-login-enumeration.test.ts (1 test), auth-helper-integration.test.ts (1 test). Total 13 new auth tests.
Also tightened rotate-key route signature (drop unused request param) and test call sites for strict typecheck.
whatWasLeftUndone: VAL-AUTH-007 (dashboard rendered post-login), VAL-AUTH-008 (session persists across refresh), VAL-AUTH-010 (post-signout protected-route redirect) need full Playwright e2e with cookie handling — left as 'pending' in validation-state.json. The createTestSessionViaAdmin helper unblocks that work when the M1 user-testing pass runs. Passed at unit/route level: 002, 003, 005, 009, 012. Passed via integration: 013 (committed in M1F3).
discoveredIssues: Fragment-token callbacks (#access_token=...&refresh_token=...) are not handled server-side — Next.js server routes never see the URL fragment. Modern Supabase magic-link emails default to ?token_hash=&type= (which we now handle). If Brandon ever sees fragment-form links in the wild, add a tiny client component at /auth/callback/page.tsx that reads window.location.hash and calls supabase.auth.setSession.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 198 passed / 1 skipped / 30 files.

filesChanged: src/app/api/sites/rotate-key/route.ts (modified — drop unused param for typecheck)
